steps.description: Stale features from cache lag cause model inputs to diverge from live state. Feature pipeline delivers 15-minute-old aggregates during peak traffic.
Stale features cause ML model to under-score transactions that should have been flagged. False negative rate increases from 2% to 8%.
Decision traces incomplete because async pipeline drops correlation IDs under load. 30% of decisions during the window cannot be reconstructed.
Label-free monitors (PSI, feature drift) do not trigger because the feature distribution shift is within normal seasonal bounds. The degradation is masked by expected variance.
Losses accumulate undetected for 14 days until ground truth labels arrive from chargeback cycle. Total undetected fraud: 340 transactions, $2.1M.
